disclaimer: DEMO DATA. Sample OpportunityScorecards produced by the geaspirit.opportunity Python backend against three Spanish AOIs. NOT a resource estimate. NOT a financial promise. Desk-validation candidates only. Legal title check and accredited sampling required before any commercial action.
guardrails_enforced_by_backend: language guardrail rejects phrases like 'confirmed reserves', 'JORC-compliant', 'NI 43-101', 'guaranteed return', 'guaranteed recovery' at dataclass construction time
score must equal subscores.commercial — anti-confusion invariant
missing data is scored as 50 (neutral), never 100 (unknown != good)

cards.thesis_summary: Lapsed (expired) mining right covers the AOI; environment is workable. The commercial angle is re-permit + due diligence on the lapsed title chain, not a fresh greenfield application.
cards.next_step_summary: Build a re-permit file: pull lapsed-title history from MITECO Catastro Minero, confirm no successor claim, scope environmental clearances anew.

cards.thesis_summary: Strong logistics (road + rail + airport) and no protected-area overlap in the search radius. Legal subscore stays at 50 (neutral) until MITECO Catastro Minero is consulted for this radius. Historic Iberian Pyrite Belt mineralisation context.
cards.next_step_summary: Desk validation: cross-check published historical occurrence with MITECO Catastro Minero and national geological survey. Identify any current concession holder before any approach.
cards.miteco_import_mode_used: none (no MITECO records loaded for this radius in the demo)

cards.thesis_summary: Excellent logistics (road + rail + port) for an exhausted Pb-Zn-Ag district. Geological subscore is lower because no fresh occurrence is declared in the AOI metadata — the angle is secondary recovery on historical tailings, which would shift the classification to remediation-led once GRID-Arendal Global Tailings Portal data is loaded.
cards.next_step_summary: Drop GRID-Arendal Global Tailings Portal CSV into data/opportunity/tailings_manual/ to surface the legacy TSFs; the AOI will then re-classify as remediation_led. Identify any current concession holder before any approach.
cards.miteco_import_mode_used: none (no MITECO records loaded for this radius in the demo)
